name: PagerDuty — incidents import
description: Imports incidents from PagerDuty (the leading on-call / incident-response alerting platform) via the REST API into XORCISM as security alerts (XINCIDENT.ALERT). Each PagerDuty incident becomes an ALERT (idempotent by its id); urgency/priority maps to severity and the affected service is recorded. Config (worker environment variables): PAGERDUTY_API_TOKEN (REST API key); optional PAGERDUTY_STATUSES (default triggered,acknowledged). Offline: pass `file` = a /incidents export JSON, or run with no config for the bundled sample.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.help: Maximum number of incidents to import

parameters.name: since_hours
parameters.help: Incidents created in the last N hours

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline: a saved /incidents export JSON to parse instead of the live API
